    addPOI(PointOfInterest) - Method in class org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.subsystems.Odometry
    Adds a new PointOfInterest for Odometry to keep track of in its POI list.
    addWaypoint(Waypoint) - Method in class org.firstinspires.ftc.teamcode.util.Path
    Appends a new waypoint at the end of the path
